reviews.review_description:
First want to say love boxing aliens in the Fun Mode with the url and app songs (but esp. the url songs).

Would appreciate a sort filter by difficulty level so I don't have to search through lists of songs to find a specific difficulty.

Also would be nice to have a favorite option for the songs so any especially awesome song could be easily found for future play :)

developer_response.body:
Hey there! 👋

Thank you so much for the kind words — we're super stoked to hear you're loving boxing aliens in Fun Mode, especially with the URL songs! 💥👽🎶 That’s exactly the kind of chaos we love too.. and its a great stress buster too, right!?

And thank you for the thoughtful suggestions! A sort-by-difficulty filter and a favorite option are both great ideas — we totally get how helpful those would be for finding your go-to tracks faster. We’re always looking at ways to improve the experience, so we’ll definitely keep this feedback in mind as we plan future updates.

Really appreciate you taking the time to share — keep on splatting! 💫

reviews.review_description: I wasn’t sure what to expect from Splatsplasm, but wow, this zany game is addicting!  Exploring a very convincing abandoned spaceship, splatting little red and blue monsters everywhere, and dodging purple monster pee that “Splats” all over me had me totally immersed. The physicality is no joke—my arms were sore the next day, but it’s so satisfying to splat those ugly little monsters. The groovy 1960s-style soundtrack is awesome, and the twist of using your own music (which changes the game’s intensity) makes it endlessly entertaining.  You don’t need a lot of room to get a good workout that doesn’t feel like one!

developer_response.body:
Wow, thank you for such an amazing review! 🚀👾 We’re so glad Splatsplasm exceeded your expectations and had you fully immersed in the chaos of alien-splatting fun. We worked hard on the spaceship environments, so it’s awesome to hear it felt convincing to you!

And yes—those purple monster 'splats' are something else, right? 😅 We’re thrilled you enjoyed the physical challenge (arm day, anyone?) and that the groovy soundtrack hit all the right notes. The fact that you loved the custom music option and its impact on gameplay means the world to us—it’s one of our favorite features too! 🎶✨

Thanks for sharing your experience, and we hope Splatsplasm keeps you entertained and "splatting" away for a long time to come. 💥💚

reviews.review_title: Fun twist on a familiar genre
reviews.review_description:
This is a fun game! The controls are easy to understand but challenging to master, providing an approachable and rewarding level of difficulty, and the various "weapons" give great opportunities for a variety of play styles (personally a big fan of the boxing gloves - punching these little goobers into oblivion is a GREAT deal of fun). The sound design is charming, too, much like the rest of the game it doesn't take itself too seriously, leading to a lighthearted experience that's easy to dip into and out of at leisure (as someone who takes time when they can, it's nice to have something to jump onto, play 20 minutes of, and jump off again). 

Highly recommend, especially as an early-access title.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your thoughtful review! 🎉 We're thrilled to hear you're enjoying the game and that the boxing gloves are a hit—there's nothing quite like practicing your boxing moves on those little monsters, right? 🥊👾

It's great to know you appreciate the balance between approachable controls and rewarding challenges, as well as the lighthearted vibe we've worked hard to create. Your feedback about being able to jump in and out of the game is super valuable—we love hearing that Splatsplasm fits into your schedule so seamlessly.

As we continue developing during early access, it’s input like yours that helps shape the future of Splatsplasm. Thanks for being part of the journey, and we can't wait to share more fun updates and features soon! 🚀💚
